Our Mission
What We Do

Three ways we show up.

🥗
Healthy Recipes

We share affordable, delicious, and easy-to-make recipes every week designed for real families with real budgets and busy schedules.

🤝
Community Events

Free workshops, cook-alongs, and wellness gatherings open to everyone in Fort Worth. Come learn, connect, and grow with us.

🛒
Food for All

We use donations to purchase quality, nutritious food and distribute it to lower-income members of our community. No one should go without good food.

"Wellness isn't a luxury. It belongs to everyone and we're here to make that real."

About Us

Youth-led. Community driven.

Pathways to Wellness is a youth-led nonprofit based in Fort Worth, Texas. We started this organization because we believe wellness should not be a privilege it should be accessible to every single person in our community, no matter their circumstances.

🥗
Healthy Recipes
Affordable, quick, and actually good shared every week.
🤝
Community Events
Learn, cook together, and support one another.
🛒
Direct Donations
Every dollar puts quality food in the hands of those who need it.
Who we are

We're not a big organization with fancy offices. We're young people from Fort Worth who care about our neighbors and we're building something real.

Why quality food matters
Lower-income families often have access only to cheap, processed food not because they don't want better, but because quality food is expensive. Our donations go directly toward buying fresh, nutritious groceries and meals for those who otherwise wouldn't have access. That's our commitment.
Why it matters in Fort Worth
1 in 5
Children in TX face food insecurity
U.S. Department of Agriculture, Economic Research Service. (2026, February 18). Food security in the U.S.: Key statistics & graphics. https://www.ers.usda.gov/topics/food-nutrition-assistance/food-security-in-the-us/key-statistics-graphics
Our Story

How it all started.

When writing a research paper about ultra-processed foods in my English class, I found that many people, especially in the U.S., consume foods that can cause long-term health conditions like heart disease and obesity.

I knew that not everyone chose to live like that, but that some simply couldn't or didn't know how to live healthier. I wanted to find a way to reach these people and help them.

That's when someone suggested that I start a nonprofit, and I soon got to work to found Pathways to Wellness!

📷 Photo coming soon
Giovanna Sanches
Founder

Join Pathways to Wellness

Fill out the form and we'll add you to our community. You'll get updates on events, healthy recipes, and ways to get involved.

No spam · Unsubscribe anytime

Your donation puts
quality food on real tables.

Every dollar goes toward purchasing fresh, nutritious food for lower-income members of our community in Fort Worth. No overhead. Just food, directly to people who need it.

$10
Feeds a family for a day
$25
A week of fresh produce
$50
Sponsors a community meal
Donate Now ❤️
Where It Goes

Every dollar has a
direct impact.

We use 100% of donations to buy fresh groceries, healthy meals, and quality food for lower-income families in Fort Worth who need it most.

We distribute food at community events and through local outreach. We are youth-led, we are local, and we are accountable to this community.

Our commitment to you:
✓
100% of donations go to food purchases - no admin fees
✓
We share updates on exactly how funds were used
✓
Every community event includes a food distribution component
✓
Youth-led, Fort Worth-based, community-accountable
✓
We focus on quality food, not just calories
